217	<body>
218	    <nav>

222	
223	    <div class="sidebar">
224	        <div class="" id="home">
225	            <img src="images/photo.jpg" alt="Profile Photo" class="profile-image">
226	            <div class="profile-text" style="text-align: left;">
227	                <h3 style="color: #444444;">
228	                    Ruizi Wang
229	                    <span class="chinese-name">汪睿子</span>
230	                </h3>
231	                <p>
232	                    <i class="fa fa-solid fa-building-columns icon-pad-right"></i>
233	                    Robotics at UMN
234	                </p>
235	                <p>
236	                    <i class="fas fa-fw fa-envelope icon-pad-right"></i>
237	                    <a href="mailto:wan01492@umn.edu" target="_blank" style="color: #666; text-decoration: none;"
238	                        onmouseover="this.style.textDecoration='underline'"
239	                        onmouseout="this.style.textDecoration='none'">
240	                        Email
241	                    </a>
242	                </p>
243	            </div>
244	        </div>
245	    </div>
246	
247	    <div class="main-content">
248	        <div class="" id="about">
249	            <h2 style="color: #444444;">About</h2>
250	            <p class="content-text">😊Hi, I'm a master student in Robotics at <a href="https://cse.umn.edu/mnri"
251	                    target="_blank">University of Minnesota, Twin Cities</a>.
252	                I'm a research assistant in the <a href="https://minnesotanlp.github.io/">Minnesota NLP group</a>
253	                and the <a href="https://qianwen.info/pages/lab_members/">Visual Intelligence Lab</a>,
254	                advised by Prof. <a href="https://dykang.github.io/">Dongyeop Kang</a> and Prof. <a
255	                    href="https://qianwen.info/">Qianwen Wang</a>.</p>
256	
257	            <p class="content-text">💻My current research interest is Human-Computer Interaction(HCI).</p>
258	
259	            <p class="content-text">🤔Specifically, I am interested in:</p>
260	            <ul class="content-text">
261	                <li>
262	                    <strong>Visualization</strong>:
263	                    Making things explainable: what you see is what you get. 
264	                </li>
265	                <li>
266	                    <strong>Human-Computer Collaboration</strong>:
267	                    Studying how people interact with technology to reveal fundamental aspects of human cognition,
268	                    enabling the development of AI systems that better understand and respond to human needs.
269	                </li>
270	                <li>
271	                    <strong>Social Computing</strong>:
272	                    Understanding how technology shapes collective human behavior and designing systems that foster collaboration and shared intelligence.
273	                </li>
274	            </ul>
275	        </div>
276	        <div class="" id="service">
277	            <h2 style="color: #444444;">Service</h2>
278	            <p class="content-text">❤️I dedicate time to volunteer translation work outside academia,
279	                facilitating cross-cultural communication for non-profit initiatives.</p>
280	            <p class="content-text">🥼Our translation group is now working on a unique series -
281	                <a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLBmriQSLAuRJvLNLhRBNso054qvpsqv3t">Therapist Plays Disco
282	                    Elysium</a>.
283	                Explore <a href="https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Kw4m1y7wc/?spm_id_from=333.880.my_history.page.click"
284	                    target="_blank">our work</a>
285	                if you're interested in psychological interpretations of <a
286	                    href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/632470/Disco_Elysium__The_Final_Cut/">Disco Elysium</a>,
287	                a critically acclaimed game exploring trauma and human consciousness through surreal detective
288	                noir(English with Chinese).
289	            </p>
290	            <p class="content-text">🎮Here's <a
291	                    href="https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1W84y1N72X/?spm_id_from=333.999.0.0" target="_blank">my
292	                    translation work</a>
293	                about video games(English to Chinese).</p>
294	            <p class="content-text">📖I'm currently studying Japanese and have passed the JLPT N4 level!</p>
295	            <p class="content-text">
296	                🎨Still trying to draw at least.
297	                <img src="images/Alice.gif" alt="Pixel">
298	            </p>
299	        </div>
300	        <div class="" id="life">
301	            <h2 style="color: #444444;">Life</h2>
302	            <p class="content-text">🎁My new year present! <s>I spend most of my other time playing video games. I've been waiting for the
303	                release of Silksong for <strong>4</strong> years.</s></p>
304	            <p class="content-text">😭Unfortunately I didn't get any offer this cycle. You can check here to 
305	                have a overview about <a href="sub/26u.html">the date about some Universities</a>.
306	            </p>
307	            <p class="content-text">💊The website's icon is False PHD from The Binding of Isaac, want to change it to
308	                PHD if possible...</p>
309	        </div>
310	        <div class="" id="cat">
311	            <h2 style="color: #444444;">Supporters</h2>
312	            <p class="content-text">🐱Special thanks to my furry babies for their tremendous support! My degree belongs
313	                to them too.</p>
314	            <p class="content-text">😸You can check more cats <a href="cat.html">here</a>!</p>
315	            <div class="cat-gallery">
316	                <div class="cat-item">
317	                    <img src="images/my_love.jpg" alt="my love" class="cat-image">
318	                    <p>Avogadro<span class="chinese-name" style="position: relative; top: -0.095em;">阿伏</span></p>
319	                    <p class="cat-caption">A graduate student at the National Cat University, majoring in Human-Cat
320	                        Relationship Studies and Social Relations.</p>
321	                </div>
322	                <div class="cat-item">
323	                    <img src="images/Reinhardt.png" alt="Reinhardt" class="cat-image">
324	                    <p>Reinhardt<span class="chinese-name" style="position: relative; top: -0.19375em;">胖胖</span></p>
325	                    <p class="cat-caption">Actually never went to school. Unfortunately, can only demonstrate
326	                        intelligence when snacks are involved.</p>
327	                </div>
328	            </div>
329	        </div>
330	        <footer>
331	            ✉️Last updated on January 1, 2026 - Feel free to contact me!!!
332	        </footer>
333	    </div>
334	</body>
335	
336	</html>

1	* {
2	    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
3	    box-sizing: border-box;

6	.underline-animate {
7	    position: relative;
8	    color: #137a7f;
9	    text-decoration: none;
10	    padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
11	    transition: color 0.3s;
12	}
13	
14	.underline-animate::after {
15	    content: "";
16	    position: absolute;
17	    left: 50%;
18	    bottom: 0;
19	    width: 0;
20	    height: 0.1875em;
21	    background: #86cecb;
22	    transform: translateX(-50%);
23	    transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.1);
24	}
25	
26	.underline-animate:hover {
27	    color: #000;
28	}
29	
30	.underline-animate:hover::after {
31	    width: 100%;
32	    left: 0;
33	    transform: none;
34	}
35	
36	a.underline-animate {
37	    color: inherit;
38	}
39	
40	nav {
41	    position: fixed;
42	    top: 0;

44	    width: 100%;

49	    z-index: 100;

55	    color: #333;
56	    text-decoration: none;
57	    margin: 0 1rem;
58	    font-weight: 500;
59	}
60	
61	@keyframes fadeInAnim {
62	    from {
63	        opacity: 0;
64	    }
65	
66	    to {
67	        opacity: 1;
68	    }
69	}
70	
71	a:link {
72	    color: #137a7f;
73	}
74	
75	a:visited {

77	}
78

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>26 Application - Ruizi Wang</title>
    <link rel="icon" href="../images/False_PHD.png" type="image/png">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="../style.css" />
    <style>
        :root {
            --page-gap: 2em;
        }

        .page {
            margin-top: 3.75rem;
            padding: 3em 4em;
            max-width: 60rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInAnim 0.5s ease forwards;
        }

        .page h2 {
            color: #444444;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        .page p.intro {
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
            color: #555;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.007em;
        }

        .table-wrap {
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        table.applications {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            color: #444;
        }

        table.applications thead th {
            text-align: left;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #444;
            padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #86cecb;
            background-color: #fafafa;
        }

        table.applications tbody td {
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        table.applications tbody tr:hover {
            background-color: #fafafa;
        }

        .status {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 0.15rem 0.6rem;
            border-radius: 999px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }

        .status-reject {
            background-color: #fdecec;
            color: #c0392b;
        }

        .status-interview {
            background-color: #eaf6f6;
            color: #137a7f;
        }

        .status-submit {
            background-color: #f3efe7;
            color: #8a7a3a;
        }

        .status-empty {
            color: #bbb;
        }

        .back-link {
            display: inline-block;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            color: #137a7f;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }

        .back-link:hover {
            color: #86cecb;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .page {
                padding: 2em 1.25em;
            }

            table.applications {
                font-size: 0.85rem;
            }

            table.applications thead th,
            table.applications tbody td {
                padding: 0.6rem 0.5rem;
            }

            nav {
                position: relative;
                box-shadow: 0 0.125rem 0.3125rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
                width: 100%;
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;
                height: 3.75rem;
                line-height: 3.75rem;
                background-color: white;
                margin: 0 auto;
                padding: 0;
            }

            nav a.underline-animate {
                display: none;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>
    <nav>
        <a href="../index.html" style="font-size: 1.5em; color: #2E2E2E; margin-left: 1em;">Ruizi Wang</a>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-15 02:38:19Z)**_

Created `sub/26u.html` with a styled table showing the 6 columns you wanted (University, DDL, Status, Date, Final Status, Final Date).

Key choices:
- Reused the site's Poppins font, teal accent (`#137a7f` / `#86cecb`), and fadeIn animation from `style.css` so it matches the index look.
- Status pills color-coded: red for Reject, teal for Interview, tan for Submit; em-dash for empty cells.
- UWaterloo's two interview rounds are kept in one row, stacked in the Date cell.
- Linked back to `index.html` via the nav and a "← Back" link at the top.
- Mobile-responsive: table scrolls horizontally on narrow screens.
